creator: clsung@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Oct 29, 2006 at 12:10:18PM +0300, Andrew Pantyukhin wrote:
> On 10/29/06, Cheng-Lung Sung <clsung@freebsd.org> wrote:
> >On Sat, Oct 28, 2006 at 07:57:16PM +0400, Andrew Pantyukhin wrote:
> >> On 10/28/06, Cheng-Lung Sung <clsung@freebsd.org> wrote:
> >> >Hi,
> >> >
> >> >On Sat, Oct 28, 2006 at 04:22:49PM +0400, Andrew Pantyukhin wrote:
> >> >> Please do take a look at the OpenBSD port for a
> >> >> clearer idea of how it was intended to look like:
> >> >>
> >> >> http://xsi.kolabore.ath.cx/download/xsi-openbsd_port.tgz
> >> >>
> >> >> Thank you!
> >> >
> >> >You mean the "_xsi:_xsi" part?
> >>
> >> That, and categories, and comment, and depends,
> >> the whole thing.
> >>
> >> Sorry I don't sound very friendly about this ;)
> >
> >Hi, I forgot you've provided a new one.
> 
> I haven't. The openbsd port can not be used as
> is. I'll provide a modified shar a bit later.

Hi,
    My fault. The man is tmclaugh@, he posted to ports@ 
    few days ago.
-- 
Cheng-Lung Sung - clsung@
